purpose: Record the containment status of all production mutation vectors for the MindShift Cloudflare Workers deployment.
canonical_invariant: No production-capable Cloudflare mutation path exists outside governed deployment lineage.

containment_measures.name: package.json deploy script disabled
containment_measures.limitation: Does not block direct `wrangler deploy` or `npx wrangler deploy` invocations

containment_measures.name: governed-deploy.ts MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT guard
containment_measures.target: governed-deploy.ts invocation outside GitHub Actions governed context
containment_measures.limitation: Environment variable can be set locally; requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN for actual deploy to succeed

containment_measures.name: governed-deploy.ts wrangler invocation detection
containment_measures.target: Direct wrangler deploy or shell-wrapped bypass patterns
containment_measures.implementation: Blocks cmd=wrangler with deploy arg, and bash/sh/zsh-wrapped wrangler deploy patterns
containment_measures.limitation: npx wrangler deploy is permitted (governed path); other shell interpreters not explicitly enumerated

containment_measures.name: governed-deploy.yml canonical chain enforcement
containment_measures.implementation: All seven canonical endpoints must return canonical responses; each step hard-fails closed

containment_measures.name: governed-deploy.yml authority expiry from /authority response
containment_measures.target: Hardcoded far-future authority expiry (2999) in legitimacy artifact
containment_measures.implementation: AUTHORITY_EXPIRY extracted from /authority JSON response; fails closed if missing; used in legitimacy artifact
containment_measures.fix_description: Replaced hardcoded '2999-01-01T00:00:00.000Z' with $AUTHORITY_EXPIRY derived from /authority endpoint response

containment_measures.name: wrangler.toml environment separation
containment_measures.implementation: [env.preview] in wrangler.toml defines separate worker (mindshift-demo-preview) with no production D1 binding
containment_measures.effect: Preview deploys cannot bind to production D1; preview worker cannot execute canonical routes against production state

containment_measures.name: Cloudflare Git Integration — account-level disable required
containment_measures.target: Automatic deploy on Git push via Cloudflare Git Integration
containment_measures.implementation: REQUIRED — must be disabled at Cloudflare account level in Workers & Pages > mindshift-demo > Settings > Build & deployments
containment_measures.status: CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED — cannot be enforced from repository code

containment_measures.name: governed-deploy.ts deploy audit registry
containment_measures.implementation: All governed-deploy.ts invocations (success, rejection, break-glass) emit to runtime/deploy_audit_registry.json

open_containment_requirements.requirement: Disable Cloudflare Git Integration at account level
Scope CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to minimum required permissions (Workers:Write)
Bind CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions OIDC rather than static secret

production_mutation_status.governed_path: CONTAINED — PATH-001 (governed-deploy.yml) is the only authorized production mutation path
production_mutation_status.git_integration: CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED — account-level disable not yet verified
production_mutation_status.local_wrangler: CLASSIFIED_OPEN — root break-glass authority; audit observable
